name: Happy Scribe
description: Transcription and subtitle generation, human + AI

developer.comment: Dublin, Ireland-based company founded in 2017 by André Bastié.

first-release.comment: Company founded and product launched in 2017; exact launch month not pinned down, recorded as year (stored month-year). Checked 2026-06-12.

status.comment: Actively sold and updated as of 2026-06-12.

license.comment: Proprietary SaaS with a limited free tier plus paid plans.

primary-type.comment: Core purpose is file/media transcription, subtitling and translation (AI + human). Also offers meeting recording, but positioned primarily as a transcription/subtitle platform.

real-time-dictation.comment: No speak-to-type dictation as a productivity input method; it transcribes uploaded/recorded audio.

file-transcription.comment: Core feature: upload audio/video files for AI or human transcription.

live-meeting-capture.comment: Offers meeting recording with integrations for Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams; free tier includes meeting recordings (45-min max).

streaming-low-latency.comment: AI transcripts are produced as a batch in minutes after upload/recording, not a live streaming transcript.

audio-sources.comment: File upload, URL import (YouTube/Vimeo), meeting recording integrations (Zoom/Meet/Teams), and microphone recording.

underlying-engine.comment: Vendor does not commit to a single named engine; historically used Google Speech-to-Text and various off-the-shelf ASR systems, and the CEO has discussed OpenAI Whisper. The current production engine is not clearly disclosed, so left null per guideline.

language-count.comment: Vendor states 150+ languages for transcription (approx; marketing also cites 119/120+ in some materials). Checked 2026-06-12.

english-accuracy.comment: No credible independent WER benchmark found; vendor claims up to 99% on clear single-speaker and ~85-95% on multi-speaker audio (marketing). Left null per guideline rather than guessing from vendor claims.

multilingual-auto-detect.comment: Supports 150+ languages with automatic language detection for transcription.

custom-vocabulary.comment: Glossaries / custom vocabulary let users add proper nouns, acronyms, and industry terms to improve recognition.

ai-summaries-notes.comment: AI Chat / AI notetaker features generate summaries and notes from recordings (file-analysis allowance varies by plan).

built-in-editor.comment: In-browser interactive editor to review and correct transcripts and subtitles. Plain transcript/subtitle editor, not media-by-text editing.

translation.comment: Translates transcripts and subtitles; vendor cites 80+ (translation) to 150+ languages.

export-formats.comment: Pro plan advertises 15+ formats including SRT, VTT, STL, XML, FCPXML, EDL, HTML; TXT/DOCX/PDF/SRT/VTT confirmed. JSON available via API export. Free/Basic tiers restrict the set.

processing-location.comment: Cloud-only processing in an EU-based (Tier IV, ISO 27001) data center; no on-device option.

offline-capable.comment: Cloud SaaS; requires a network connection.

data-used-for-training.comment: Vendor positions content as 100% user-owned ("you decide how it's used"), is SOC 2 Type II and GDPR compliant, and acts as a GDPR data processor; independent review states content is not used to train AI models. Primary security page does not give an explicit numbered no-training clause, so based on the stated processor posture. Checked 2026-06-12.

data-deletion-control.comment: Users can delete files (fully removed after a 10-day precautionary window) and request account deletion.

platforms.comment: Primarily a web app with iOS and Android mobile apps.

system-wide-dictation.comment: Not a dictation tool; no OS-wide speak-to-type.

integrations.comment: Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, plus Google Calendar/Outlook; also YouTube, Vimeo, Drive, Dropbox, Box, and Zapier (not in the defined tag set).

api-automation.comment: REST API for transcription, subtitling, exports (15+ formats), folder management, and webhooks.

pricing-model.comment: Free tier plus subscription plans; human professional transcription/subtitling priced per minute (usage-based). Checked 2026-06-12.

free-tier.comment: Free plan with unlimited meeting recordings (45-min max each) plus a 10-minute AI transcription/subtitling/translation trial allowance.

free-allowance.value: 10 min AI transcription trial + unlimited meeting recordings (45 min max each), 3 files/mo AI Chat, TXT/SRT export only

entry-price-usd-mo.comment: Basic plan €17/mo billed monthly (~$17 at par; ~€8.50/mo if billed annually). Includes 120 min monthly AI credits. Checked 2026-06-12; EUR used as USD approximation.
